text: Bitcoin is holding steady near $64k with modest gains while Ethereum lags slightly behind, suggesting traders are favoring risk-on movement in smaller caps like SOL and BNB rather than rotating into Ethereum. Extreme fear (18) has eased marginally over the week, but the low reading paired with relatively thin $52B volume indicates conviction remains weak and participants are cautious about committing fresh capital. Bitcoin's dominant 56.6% market share suggests the market is defaulting to the safest major asset, typical of periods when uncertainty outweighs upside appetite.
